news.headline: Kinetik (NYSE: KNTK) increases quarterly cash dividend to $0.78 per share, or $3.12 annually, for Q3 2024.
news.summary: Kinetik Holdings Inc. (NYSE: KNTK) based in Houston & Midland, Texas, has declared an uptick in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.78 per share, totaling $3.12 annually for the third quarter ending on September 30, 2024. This marks a 4% increase compared to the previous quarterly dividend. The dividend is scheduled to be distributed on Thursday, November 7, 2024, to shareholders of record as of the market close.

news.headline: IFF will release Q3 2024 results on Nov 5, 2024, with a webcast on Nov 6, 2024 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Stock: NYSE:IFF. Website: ir.iff.com.
news.summary: New York-based company IFF (NYSE:IFF) has revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on Tuesday, Nov. 5, following the market's closure. Subsequently, on Wednesday, Nov. 6, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. ET, the management team will conduct a live webcast to converse about the results and future prospects with investors. The webcast and slide presentation can be accessed by investors on the Company's website at ir.iff.com. In case some shareholders are unable to join the live broadcast, a recorded version will be available for later viewing.

news.headline: Williams (WMB) to unveil Q3 2024 financial results on Nov. 6, with earnings call on Nov. 7 at 9:30 am ET. Register to join.
news.summary: TULSA, Okla.--Williams (NYSE: WMB) is set to reveal its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on Wednesday, Nov. 6, 2024, after the market closes. A conference call and webcast discussing the company’s earnings with analysts and investors will take place on Thursday, Nov. 7, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. Eastern Time (8:30 a.m. Central Time). For those interested in participating via phone, registration is required through the provided link: https://register.vevent.com/register/BIf053fa45b660426a8.

news.headline: Wall Street analyzing Amazon's Project Kuiper satellite internet, impacting profitability push.
news.summary: Stock analysts are currently evaluating the impact of Amazon's Project Kuiper satellite internet initiative on the company's profit drive. This move has sparked discussions on Wall Street regarding the potential costs and benefits of Amazon's entry into the competitive field of satellite-based internet services. Project Kuiper aims to provide internet access to underserved areas through a network of satellites. The outcome of this project could significantly influence Amazon's financial standing in the market.

news.headline: Cynthia McCabe promoted to Exelon SVP and Chief Communications Officer effective Nov.1, 2024. VP to SVP.
news.summary: Exelon Corp. (NASDAQ: EXC) recently revealed the appointment of Cynthia McCabe as the new senior vice president, chief of staff, and chief communications officer, starting on Nov. 1, 2024. McCabe, who previously served as the vice president in charge of Executive Operations and as the chief of staff to Exelon President and CEO Calvin Butler, will now be responsible for managing communications and marketing activities across Exelon and its six local energy firms. This includes overseeing both external and internal communications, as well as reputation initiatives.

news.headline: Pure Storage Cl A stock gains stronger price momentum, upgraded to higher IBD Relative Strength Rating.
news.summary: Pure Storage's Class A shares have displayed a stronger price performance, resulting in an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating. This signifies positive momentum in the stock's value. The company's stock price has shown improvement, leading to an increase in its rating. This positive trend indicates a promising outlook for Pure Storage in the market.

news.headline: Charles Schwab receives RS rating upgrade, indicating improving technical performance. Will the trend continue?
news.summary: Charles Schwab has recently received a Relative Strength Rating (RS Rating) upgrade indicating improving technical performance. This upgrade suggests positive momentum for the stock. It remains to be seen if this trend will continue in the future.

news.headline: Trump and Biden are pushing reshoring trend, a $10 trillion opportunity for US industrial companies. Six stocks to benefit.
news.summary: Trump and Biden are both advocating for the reshoring trend, which is being identified as a lucrative $10 trillion opportunity for American industrial firms. This movement towards bringing back manufacturing to the United States is gaining momentum and is projected to significantly benefit six specific stocks, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Investors hold onto 'Magnificent 7' stocks despite going sideways. Key takeaways from stock brokerage earnings calls.
news.summary: This week's earnings calls from stock brokerages revealed six significant points. Investors are increasingly willing to take on risks in their investments. Despite fluctuations, they continue to hold onto the "Magnificent Seven" stocks.

news.headline: EnerSys (NYSE: ENS) recognized in TIME World's Best Companies & Forbes Best Employers for New Grads 2024. Prestigious rankings.
news.summary: EnerSys, a leading global provider of stored energy solutions for industrial use, has recently been recognized in two esteemed lists for the year 2024. The company has secured a place in the TIME World’s Best Companies 2024 list as well as the Forbes Best Employers for New Grads 2024 list. Achieving these accolades signifies EnerSys' commitment to excellence and innovation in the industry. The rankings were conducted by TIME, Forbes, and Statista, a prominent provider of industry rankings and statistical data. The TIME World’s Best Companies 2024 list is a thorough evaluation aimed at identifying top-performing companies, highlighting EnerSys' standing in the global market.

news.headline: Airgain (NASDAQ: AIRG) granted inducement awards to 2 new employees on 10/16/2024 under its 2021 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan.
news.summary: Airgain, Inc., a prominent provider of wireless connectivity solutions worldwide, disclosed that it granted inducement awards to two new employees joining the company. The awards, given on October 16, 2024, are part of Airgain’s 2021 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan. This plan enables the granting of equity awards to fresh hires, facilitating their integration into the company. The awards signify Airgain’s commitment to attracting and retaining top talent, supporting its growth and innovation in the wireless industry.

news.headline: Hanford Tank Waste Operations & Closure, LLC granted approval to start cleanup contract for Hanford Tanks.
news.summary: A company called Hanford Tank Waste Operations & Closure, LLC has been approved to start the cleanup contract for Hanford Tanks in Lynchburg, Virginia. The contract involves managing and closing waste tanks at the Hanford site. The approval signifies a significant step forward in the cleanup efforts at the Hanford site, which is crucial for environmental remediation. This contract is expected to involve a substantial investment of resources and is important for ensuring the safe and efficient handling of tank waste. The approval marks an important milestone in the cleanup process, demonstrating progress in addressing environmental challenges in the area.

news.headline: Katrina Redmond from Eaton named among Women Impact Tech's 2025 influential women for diversity in tech.
news.summary: Cleveland-based intelligent power management company, Eaton, shared the news today that their Executive Vice President and Chief Information Officer, Katrina Redmond, has been named one of Women Impact Tech’s 2025 Women of Impact. This recognition spotlights exceptional women driving change in the technology sector by advocating for diversity, inclusion, and gender equality. Redmond's leadership is paving the way for future women leaders in technology. Since her appointment at Eaton, she has been instrumental in steering impactful initiatives within the organization.

news.headline: Nasdaq erases most gains as Dow gets bullish boost from Travelers. Stock market fades late.
news.summary: Travelers provided a strong boost to the Dow Jones as it saw an increase. However, towards the end of the day, the stock market began to decline with the Nasdaq erasing a majority of its previous gains. The live coverage of this event was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Bell Media to bring USA Network and Oxygen True Crime to Canada in 2025. Discovery rebrands as USA Network. Three channels to rebrand on Jan 1- CTV Wild, CTV Nature, and CTV Speed.
news.summary: Bell Media announced that Discovery will be renaming itself as USA Network, and Investigation Discovery will undergo a rebranding as Oxygen True Crime starting January 1, 2025. Alongside these changes, three more channels will rebrand as CTV Wild, CTV Nature, and CTV Speed on the same date. These rebrandings are part of Bell Media's efforts to revamp their network lineup. The transformation is slated to take place in Toronto, with the change expected to bring a fresh identity to the channels and cater to a wider audience.

news.headline: Verra Mobility partners with two rental car companies in Italy to streamline toll payments on over 4,600 km of roads.
news.summary: Verra Mobility Corporation (NASDAQ: VRRM) has recently introduced a new technology offering enhanced convenience and speed for tourists renting vehicles and using the extensive network of toll roads spanning over 4,600 kilometers in Italy. This technology aims to streamline the traveling experience for visitors. The implementation of this innovation from Verra Mobility Corporation is set to transform the way tourists navigate the toll roads in Italy, ultimately resulting in a more efficient journey.

news.headline: GoPro to release Q3 earnings on Nov 7, 2024 after market close. Conference call to discuss results.
news.summary: A company based in San Mateo, California, disclosed on October 17, 2024, that GoPro, Inc. (NASDAQ: GPRO) will unveil its financial outcomes for Q3 2024 concluding on September 30, 2024. The report is scheduled to be publicized post the market closure on Thursday, November 7, 2024. GoPro's executives are set to conduct a conference call for discussing these financial particulars.

news.headline: Middlefield Banc Corp. discloses 2024 nine-month financial results; ended Sep 30, 2024, with ticker MBCN.
news.summary: Middlefield Banc Corp, a company listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol MBCN, recently released its financial results for the nine-month period ending on September 30, 2024. The corporation is based in Middlefield, Ohio.

news.headline: UTI launches new EV and BHEV curriculum at Avondale and Orlando campuses. Five campuses offer it in core automotive program. Further rollouts planned. - PHOENIX, 10/17/2024.
news.summary: Five academic institutions have implemented the updated curriculum within their primary automotive program, with intentions to extend it to additional campuses. This development was disclosed by Universal Technical Institute on October 17th, 2024. Universal Technical Institute, the division of Universal Technical Institute, Inc. specializing in transportation, skilled trades, and energy education, is spearheading this initiative.

news.headline: Markem-Imaje introduces new services for industrial coding, including digital & on-site support.
news.summary: Downers Grove, Illinois - On October 17, 2024, Markem-Imaje, a subsidiary of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a leading global supplier of supply chain solutions and industrial marking and coding systems, revealed the introduction of a wide range of digital, remote, and on-site hardware solutions.

news.headline: OceanFirst Financial Corp. reports Q3 net income of $24.1M, an increase from $19.7M last year; 9-month net income $75.1M.
news.summary: Red Bank, New Jersey - OceanFirst Financial Corp. (NASDAQ:OCFC) disclosed its latest financial results, showing a net income available to common stockholders of $24.1 million, equating to $0.42 per diluted share, for the three-month period ending on September 30, 2024. This marks a notable increase from the figures recorded in the same quarter of the previous year, which stood at $19.7 million or $0.33 per diluted share. In comparison to the last quarter, where the net income was $23.4 million or $0.40 per diluted share, there was a slight uptick. Looking at a wider timeframe, for the nine months leading up to September 30, 2024, the Company reported a net income available to common stockholders of $75.1 million, translating to $1.29 per diluted share. This figure also demonstrated growth from the same period in the prior year, where the net income was $73.3 million or $1.24 per diluted share. For more detailed performance metrics, the company advises referring to the "Selected Quarterly Financial Data."

news.headline: Link Mortuary Equipment introduces new SS150XLC single deck for full-sized cargo vans, available at 2024 NFDA.
news.summary: In Sioux Center, Iowa on October 17, 2024, Link Mortuary Equipment unveiled its latest offering - the SS150XLC single deck system designed for full-sized cargo vans. This new transport deck system will soon be up for order at the 2024 NFDA (National Funeral Directors Association) event. As the industry leader in this sector, Link Mortuary Equipment continues to innovate, providing solutions tailored for funeral professionals. This latest product is expected to cater to a growing demand, enhancing efficiency and effectiveness in transporting deceased individuals.

news.headline: Universal Technical Institute-Sacramento to start HVACR program alongside other courses, pending approvals.
news.summary: A new campus set to open in Sacramento will provide educational programs in HVACR, welding, automotive, and diesel. The announcement was made by Universal Technical Institute-Sacramento on October 17, 2024. The campus will soon introduce an HVACR program pending regulatory approvals.

news.headline: Crystal Clinic Plastic Surgeons and Cleveland's Fox8 partner for Breast Reconstruction Awareness in Ohio.
news.summary: In FAIRLAWN, Ohio, on October 17, 2024, a collaboration has been initiated to educate and empower women about their options in breast reconstruction. Crystal Clinic Plastic Surgeons are leading this effort in conjunction with Breast Cancer Awareness Month and Breast Reconstruction Awareness Day. This initiative aims to provide important information to women, with a focus on promoting awareness and understanding of breast reconstruction. Such collaborative efforts play a crucial role in supporting women's health, with a specific emphasis on breast cancer survivors. This event serves as a platform to address key concerns and offer valuable insights into breast reconstruction options.

news.headline: Moog Inc. will announce fiscal 2024 Q4 and full year earnings on Nov 1, 2024 via webcast in East Aurora, NY.
news.summary: Moog Inc., a company based in East Aurora, New York, has announced that they will be revealing their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2024 through a webcast scheduled for November 1, 2024. This event will provide stakeholders and interested parties with important information regarding the company's performance throughout the mentioned period.

news.headline: United Homes Group (NASDAQ: UHG) to publish Q3 2024 results on Nov 8, 2024. Conference call at 8:30 AM Eastern Time.
news.summary: United Homes Group (NASDAQ: UHG) based in Chapin, South Carolina, revealed plans to unveil its third-quarter 2024 results on Friday, November 8, 2024, before the market opens. A conference call is set to take place on the same day at 8:30 AM Eastern Time for discussing the outcomes and engaging in a question-and-answer session. The interested parties can join the call by dialling the specified numbers or by accessing a webcast link available in the investor relations section of the company.

news.headline: Springview Holdings Ltd closes IPO, offering 1.5M Class A shares at $4/share, trading on Nasdaq under "SPHL" ticker symbol.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Springview Holdings Ltd finished its initial public offering on Nasdaq (SPHL). The Singapore-based company, specializing in construction, closed the offering of 1,500,000 Class A ordinary shares at US$4.00 per share. The shares, with the ticker symbol "SPHL," started trading on the same day.

news.headline: Modiv Industrial (NYSE: MDV) to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 6; conference call at 11 am ET. Call 1-877-407-0789.
news.summary: Denver-based Modiv Industrial, Inc. (NYSE: MDV), a prominent public REIT specializing in industrial manufacturing real estate acquisitions, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024, concluding on September 30, 2024. The report is scheduled for release before market commencement on Wednesday, November 6, 2024. Following this, company executives will conduct a conference call at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the details of the results. For those interested in participating, a live conference call has been arranged at 1-877-407-0789.

news.headline: Credicorp Ltd. (NYSE: BAP) initiates quiet period for 3Q24 earnings release on Oct 24-Nov 7; no financial info to be disclosed.
news.summary: Lima, Peru - October 17, 2024 - Today, Credicorp (NYSE: BAP) has disclosed that the quiet period for the release of its 3Q24 financial results will commence on October 24th, with the end date set for November 7th. This measure is being taken in line with the company's corporate policies to prevent the premature disclosure of financial information and maintain fairness. Throughout this period, Credicorp will refrain from sharing any financial updates, discussing results, or addressing related inquiries.

news.headline: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. (Nasdaq: SBRA) to release Q3 earnings on Oct 31, 2024, with a conference call on Nov 1 at 10:00am PT. Dial-in: 888-880-4448 for U.S. participants, 646-960-0572 for non-U.S. participants.
news.summary: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. (Nasdaq: SBRA) of Tustin, California, has revealed plans to unveil its 2024 third-quarter earnings report on October 31, 2024, post the market closure. They have scheduled a conference call alongside a webcast to review the results on November 1st at 10:00 a.m. Pacific Time. Interested parties can dial 888-880-4448 for U.S. participants or 646-960-0572 for international participants to join the call, using the conference ID provided.

news.headline: Wellchange Holdings Co. Ltd. fully exercises underwriters’ over-allotment option, sells 1,265,000 shares, raising approx $5.06M.
news.summary: Wellchange Holdings Company Limited, a software services provider in Hong Kong, announced the full exercise of its over-allotment option by underwriters for its recent initial public offering. The purchase of 165,000 additional ordinary shares at $4.00 per share resulted in gross proceeds of $660,000. The total shares sold in the offering increased to 1,265,000, raising gross proceeds to around $5.06 million. The company also issued warrants for 5,775 Ordinary Shares. Trading of Wellchange's shares began on Nasdaq on October 2, 2024, under the symbol “WCT.”

news.headline: Five Point Holdings, LLC reports Q3 2024 net income of $12.3 million, with $224.5 million cash on hand.CEO expresses confidence.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, Five Point Holdings, LLC, a company specializing in large mixed-use planned communities in California, shared their third quarter 2024 results. CEO Dan Hedigan announced a remarkable net income of $12.3 million for the quarter, marking the sixth consecutive quarter of positive net income. The company finished the quarter with $224.5 million in cash and cash equivalents.

news.headline: BancFirst Corp reported Q3 2024 net income of $58.9M, or $1.75 per diluted share, with $115.0M net interest income, and $48.7M noninterest income. Noninterest expenses were $86.7M. Total assets at $13.3B, loans grew $528.1M, deposits $11.5B, stockholders' equity $1.6B. Nonaccrual loans $45.5M, allowances to total loans 1.24%. CEO David Harlow mentioned loan growth, improved net interest margin.
news.summary: BancFirst Corporation reported a net income of $58.9 million, or $1.75 per diluted share, for the third quarter of 2024, compared to $51.0 million, or $1.52 per diluted share, in 2023. Net interest income increased to $115.0 million in 2024 from $104.3 million in 2023, driven by loan volume. Noninterest income rose to $48.7 million, with trust revenue, treasury income, sweep fees, and insurance commissions increasing. Total assets were $13.3 billion, up by $941.4 million from December 2023, with loans at $8.2 billion and deposits at $11.5 billion. Nonaccrual loans were $45.5 million, representing 0.56% of total loans, up from 0.32% in 2023. CEO David Harlow noted strong performance and discussed managing asset and liability pricing in light of potential rate changes. The Company's effective tax rate for the period was 20.3%. This information was provided by BancFirst Corporation, an Oklahoma-based financial services holding company.

news.headline: Angel Oak Mortgage REIT, Inc. (NYSE: AOMR) will release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 6, 2024, with a conference call at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: In Atlanta, Angel Oak Mortgage REIT, Inc. (NYSE: AOMR) revealed plans to unveil its third quarter results for 2024 on November 6, 2024, before the market opens. This prominent real estate finance firm specializes in acquiring and investing in first lien non-QM loans and other mortgage-related assets within the U.S. mortgage market. Following the release, a conference call is scheduled at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Stay informed by tuning into the webcast for further insights.

news.headline: Backblaze (Nasdaq: BLZE) to release Q3 2024 results on Nov. 7, following its quarter ending Sept. 30, 2024.
news.summary: Based in San Mateo, California, Backblaze, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLZE), a leading cloud storage company offering innovative solutions compared to conventional providers, is set to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, on Thursday, November 7, 2024, post the market's closure.

news.headline: Fastenal promotes Donnalee K. Papenfuss to EVP of Strategy and Communications, overseeing marketing and strategic initiatives.
news.summary: Winona, Minnesota – Fastenal Company (Nasdaq: FAST) has appointed Donnalee K. Papenfuss as the Executive Vice President of Strategy and Communications from November 1, 2024. Ms. Papenfuss's promotion to this new role will see her overseeing marketing and spearheading strategic endeavors in technology, sales, and environmental, social, and governance (ESG) fields. Her responsibilities will also include bolstering communication strategies to reinforce these initiatives and ensure cohesion.

news.headline: Blue Moon Metals Inc. elects 3 new board members. Shareholders approved annual items with 21.5M votes, 40.5% of all shares.
news.summary: Blue Moon Metals Inc. based in Vancouver, British Columbia announced on October 17, 2024, that its shareholders have approved all annual business items. A total of 21,519,612 common shares were voted on, accounting for 40.5% of all outstanding common share votes. The meeting, held in compliance with corporate, securities law, and stock exchange regulations, saw positive outcomes for the Company. Blue Moon Metals Inc. trades on the TSX-V as MOON and on the OTCQB as BMOOF.

news.headline: DraftKings (Nasdaq: DKNG) will reveal Q3 2024 results on 11/7/24, followed by a conference call on 11/8/24 in Boston.
news.summary: Boston-based company DraftKings Inc. (Nasdaq: DKNG) revealed plans to unveil its Q3 2024 financial results on Thursday, November 7, 2024, after the markets close.

news.headline: Middlefield Banc Corp. reported a decrease in net income to $10.7M. Total loans and deposits increased to a record high of $1.5B. Net interest income declined to $42.9M. Charge-offs and non-performing loans increased due to one customer, leading to higher provision for credit losses. Non-GAAP measures show focused core profitability despite challenges. Stockholders' equity at $210.7M with $0.60 per share dividends declared. Noninterest expense at lowest level in six quarters. Total assets at $1.86B. Loan portfolio saw a 3.9% increase to $1.5B, while total deposits rose to $1.51B. Tangible book value per share increased by 12.1%.äCharacter count: 438
news.summary: Middlefield Banc Corp. reported financial results for the nine months ending September 30, 2024. Their net income was $10.7 million, down from $13.8 million year-over-year. Pre-tax net income was $14.7 million, down from $19.0 million. Earnings per diluted share were $1.32, down from $1.70. Total loans and deposits both increased to $1.50 billion and $1.51 billion respectively, with a growth of 3.9% and 3.8% each. Noninterest income rose to $5.3 million. Nonperforming assets increased to 1.62%. Stockholders' equity reached $210.7 million, with total assets at $1.86 billion. Total liabilities stood at $1.65 billion, and the equity-to-assets ratio was 11.34%. They declared cash dividends of $0.60 per share and repurchased 43,858 shares. Middlefield's CRE portfolio totaled $689,270. The press release also discussed the impact of non-GAAP financial measures and forward-looking statements on their future performance.

news.headline: Manhattan Associates to report Q3 2024 earnings on Oct. 22. Expected EPS $1.06, revenues $261M-$265M. Earnings beat in 4Q with average 26.61% surprise. Zacks Consensus Estimate shows 0.95% increase in earnings and 10.45% increase in revenues over the year-ago quarter.
news.summary: Manhattan Associates, listed as MANH on the NASDAQ, is scheduled to reveal its third-quarter 2024 results on October 22nd. The company anticipates earnings for this quarter to reach $1.06 per share, with revenues projected to fall between $261 million to $265 million. Over the past 30 days, the Zacks Consensus Estimate for earnings has remained at $1.06 per share, signifying a 0.95% increase from the same period last year. For revenues, the Zacks Consensus Estimate stands at $263.36 million, showing a 10.45% rise from the year-ago quarter’s figure. Manhattan Associates has outperformed the Zacks Consensus Estimate for earnings in the past four quarters, with an average surprise of 26.61%. The pending announcement is expected to be boosted by strong demand for its mission-critical services.

news.headline: Matco Tools donates to Lincoln Foundation for Education to provide scholarships for transportation careers until 2028.
news.summary: Matco Tools has announced funding for a scholarship program that will run until 2028 to support students pursuing careers in transportation. The program will provide financial assistance to individuals undergoing training for transportation-related professions.

news.headline: Cyprus halts crypto applications before EU MiCA transition. CySEC warns providers of upcoming regulations as Europe prepares for MiCA.
news.summary: CySEC issues caution to crypto asset service providers regarding upcoming alterations, as Europe prepares for the Markets in Crypto-assets Regulation (MiCA).

news.headline: HUMBL secures US patent for blockchain payments tech.
news.summary: Last year, a record-breaking 2.5 million individuals in the country were affected by a data breach, which exposed their personal information. This breach resulted in financial losses totaling over $100 million. The cybersecurity breach was a result of a sophisticated hacking campaign that targeted various organizations, including government agencies and businesses. Authorities are investigating the incident and working to strengthen cybersecurity measures to prevent future breaches. The affected individuals have been advised to monitor their financial accounts closely and report any suspicious activity.

news.headline: Bitcoin falls below $67K as investors shift to stocks for profit. SEC's decision may favor BTC.
news.summary: Bitcoin saw a decrease from its recent high point as investors sought other investment opportunities, but a regulatory issue faced by the SEC could potentially work in favor of Bitcoin.

news.headline: Match Group will webcast Q3 2024 earnings conference call on Nov 7, 2024, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time (ET).
news.summary: Match Group (NASDAQ: MTCH) announced a webcast for a conference call to discuss its third quarter 2024 financial results on November 7, 2024, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The call comes after the market closes on November 6.

news.headline: Fairway Independent Mortgage Corporation promotes David Lazowski after being named #1 in J.D. Power 2023 study for customer satisfaction.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin on October 17, 2024, Fairway Independent Mortgage Corporation, which was ranked as the top company for customer satisfaction in mortgage origination by J.D. Power in their 2023 U.S. Mortgage Origination Satisfaction Study, revealed the advancement of David Lazowski to a new position.

news.headline: Texas Instruments board declares $1.36 quarterly dividend for Q4 2024, payable Nov. 12 to shareholders of record on Oct. 31.
news.summary: Today in Dallas, the board of directors of Texas Instruments Incorporated (Nasdaq: TXN) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.36 per share of common stock. This dividend will be payable on November 12, 2024, to stockholders who are on record as of October 31, 2024. Texas Instruments is known for its leading innovations in the technology sector.

news.headline: UiPath to hold Investor Session at FORWARD + TechEd 2024 in Vegas on Oct 21, 2024, from 4-5pm PT at MGM Grand.
news.summary: UiPath, Inc., a prominent agentic automation and AI software company listed on NYSE under ticker symbol PATH, will be holding an Investor Session during its annual user conference, FORWARD + TechEd 2024. The event is scheduled to take place at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas on October 21, 2024, from 4:00 pm to 5:00 pm PT (7:00 pm to 8:00 pm ET). The Investor Session will include executives, a customer panel, and a live Q&A session. This conference aims to provide inspiration and valuable insights for attendees.

news.headline: South Plains Financial, Inc. raises quarterly cash dividend by 7% to $0.15/share, payable on Nov. 12 to shareholders as of Oct. 28.
news.summary: In Lubbock, Texas, on October 17, 2024, South Plains Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ:SPFI), the holding company of City Bank, shared plans for a quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per common stock share. This marks a significant 7% boost compared to the previous quarterly cash dividend announced in July 2024. Shareholders as of October 28, 2024, will receive the dividend on November 12, 2024.

news.headline: Wabtec (NYSE: WAB) declares a 20 cents/share quarterly dividend, to be paid on Nov 27, 2024, to shareholders on record by Nov 13.
news.summary: Pittsburgh-based Wabtec Corporation (NYSE: WAB) recently declared a regular quarterly common dividend of 20 cents per share. The dividend is set to be paid on November 27, 2024, to shareholders of record as of November 13, 2024. Wabtec Corporation, a prominent global provider in freight and transit rail industries, is focused on transforming transportation for upcoming generations through its equipment, systems, digital solutions, and value-added services.
